data.title: World-Renowned Children's Illustrators Transform Lost Luggage into 'Canvases of Hope' for Foster Children
data.description: A live 'Love Luggage' painting event will be hosted on May 2 by Unclaimed Baggage and the Society of Illustrators in Scottsboro, Alabama. This event marks the beginning of National Foster Care Month. Unclaimed Baggage, known as the sole retailer of lost luggage in the country, has collaborated with the Society of Illustrators for this event. The date of the event is set for May 2, 2026, in Scottsboro, Alabama.

data.title: OMI Advances Rigorous Testing of Breakthrough 3-Minute Charge Battery Technology
data.description: In Dallas on April 15, 2026, OMI's innovative advancements in ultra-rapid battery charging are drawing widespread recognition as the company progresses into a crucial stage of cutting-edge experimentation. data.title: Lightkeeper Lumina Layers AI Intelligence into the Portfolio Analytics Platform
data.description: Lightkeeper's AI journey takes a significant step forward with the introduction of Lumina, integrating intelligence into their platform. This advancement allows investment teams to uncover more profound insights and better concentrate on making decisions rather than sifting through data. The announcement was made in Boston on April 16, 2026, by Lightkeeper, a prominent provider of data and analytics solutions.

data.title: Zhang Financial Announces Charles Zhang's Forbes and Barron's Rankings
data.description: In Portage, Michigan on April 16, 2026, Charles Zhang, an accomplished professional holding designations CFP®, MBA, MSFS, ChFC®, Founder, and President of Zhang Financial, a Fee-Only wealth management firm, has secured the 5th spot in the Forbes List of 2026 America's Top Wealth Advisors. Zhang stands out as the top-ranking advisor on the list not affiliated with any particular entity.

data.title: Huntington Bank Surpasses $50 Million Raised for Pelotonia
data.description: Huntington National Bank in Columbus, Ohio, reached a significant milestone on April 16, 2026, by exceeding $50 million in funds raised for Pelotonia, a notable cancer research ride. This achievement has established Huntington as the most significant supporter in the history of Pelotonia.

data.title: IBM and the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign Expand Discovery Accelerator Institute to Advance AI and Quantum Computing
data.description: The IBM-Illinois Discovery Accelerator Institute is embarking on a new research project to develop a cutting-edge supercomputing architecture that focuses on quantum technology. This initiative will combine IBM quantum computers with high-performance computing resources from the University of Illinois' National Center for Supercomputing Applications. The project is set to span the next five years, during which significant advancements in quantum-centric computing are anticipated.

data.title: Quaint Oak Bancorp, Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Southampton, Pa., Quaint Oak Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQB: QNTO), the parent company of Quaint Oak Bank, revealed that their Board of Directors authorized a quarterly cash dividend of $0.04 per share on the Company's common stock on April 15, 2026. Shareholders as of April 27, 2026, will receive the dividend on May 11, 2026.

data.title: Capstone Shares Rise On Q4 Report, Strong Revenue Outlook
data.description: Shares of Capstone Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: CAPS) surged today following the release of their fourth-quarter financial results and their fiscal-year 2026 revenue guidance, which exceeded expectations. However, the company fell short in its Q4 results, reporting an adjusted loss of $1.00 per share compared to the estimated loss of 13 cents per share. Additionally, their revenue for the quarter amounted to $12.76 million, slightly below the anticipated $12.80 million. Despite these figures, Capstone declared that they concluded fiscal-year 2025 with approximately $46.9 million in revenue, showcasing a 23% expansion in gross margin. The company credited their strong performance to the scale achieved through acquisitions.
Fed's Miran: Current understanding of financial conditions may be incomplete because private credit is not included, distorting estimates of growth.

data.title: AbbaDox Wins NextGen Tech Award at RBMA Rad Honors
data.description: A company based in Aventura, Florida, AbbaDox, was honored at the RBMA Rad Honors ceremony during the RBMA PaRADigm annual meeting on April 16, 2026. AbbaDox received the NextGen Tech Award for its operational AI platform that has demonstrated a significant impact on imaging center workflow and patient access. The award highlights the platform's measurable benefits to the industry.

data.title: CINC Expands Cephai With New AI Capabilities, Single Sign-On, and a Unified Operating Experience for Community Association Management
data.description: DULUTH, Ga. - On April 16, 2026, CINC Systems unveiled a significant development in their platform, incorporating AI technology. With a staggering $25 billion projected for community payments, the company anticipates processing over 1 million invoices in 2026 alone. This move cements Cephai as the consolidated operational interface encompassing all CINC products.
